mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : BbsViewDAO.selectBbsView 설 명 : 게시판 조회 정보 */ SELECT VWER_ID , ATCL_ID , INQ_CNT , LST_INQ_DTTM , FRST_INQ_DTTM
FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD WHERE ATCL_ID = #{atclId} AND VWER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.sql:
SELECT A.VWER_ID , A.ATCL_ID
, A.LST_INQ_DTTM , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.VWER_ID = B.USER_PRFIL_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER_PRFIL C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_PRFIL_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.ATCL_ID = #{atclId} AND A.VWER_ID != 'tmpuser'
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : BbsViewDAO.listBbsViewPaging 설 명 : 게시판 조회자 목록 페이징 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC) AS LINE_NO , A.* , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND CD = A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPTNM FROM (
) A LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{listScale}
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : BbsViewDAO.updateBbsView 설 명 : 게시판 조회자 정보 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD SET INQ_CNT = INQ_CNT + 1 , LST_INQ_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHERE 1=1 AND ATCL_ID = #{atclId} AND VWER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.sql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC) AS LINE_NO , C.USER_PRFIL_ID , B.USER_ACNT_ID , B.USERNM , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE CD = C.DEPT_CD) AS DEPTNM , CASE WHEN D.INQ_CNT IS NOT NULL THEN D.INQ_CNT ELSE 0 END AS INQ_CNT , D.FRST_INQ_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_PRFIL_ID AND B.USER_ID_STSCD = 'U' JOIN TB_LMS_USER_PRFIL C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_PRFIL_ID AND C.ORG_ID = #{orgId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD D ON A.USER_ID = D.VWER_ID AND D.ATCL_ID = #{atclId} WHERE A.CMCRS_GBNCD = 'S' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctCd}
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : BbsViewDAO.countBbsViewStd 설 명 : 수강생별 조회자 목록 수 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (
AND D.VWER_ID IS NOT NULL ) Z
/* SQL ID : BbsViewDAO.listBbsViewStd 설 명 : 수강생별 조회 목록 */
